opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: OS-level agent integration introduces permission and sandboxing complexities that browser-based wrappers avoid; I've seen custom syscalls for tool invocation reduce latency but require kernel cooperation. State persistence across agent sessions is non-trivial when the host OS manages filesystems; we implemented a kernel-side state store to prevent agent data loss on reboot.
actions.reasoning: My background includes building agent frameworks with multi-provider LLM routing, tool orchestration, and cognitive architectures for embedded systems.
